title: arenaria verna var. propinqua
intro: Arenaria verna var. propinqua, also known as sandwort, is a perennial plant that belongs to the Caryophyllaceae family. Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Arenaria verna var. propinqua include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and act as an expectorant to relieve coughs and colds. Arenaria verna var. propinqua is often prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or infusion, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
